name: agent-team
description: Mission/Wave and Agent Team orchestration for a Kimi Code Host, backed by Star Harness.

interface.shortDescription: Form, drive, and observe Mission/Wave Agent Teams from a Kimi Code session.
interface.longDescription: Gives the host Kimi Code session Star Harness Mission/Wave and Agent Team capabilities (ADR 0025): create and asynchronously start Kimi ACP MemberRuns, exchange explicitly acknowledged messages, gate Waves, and inspect exact Dashboard deep links. Codex and Claude Member adapters remain planned and are not claimed by this package.

skillInstructions: Prefer the harness MCP tools for Mission/Wave/TeamRun calls; CLI commands are a fallback. Agent Team is for work whose result should stay with a living executor while you keep a pointer; use a sub-agent when the result must come back into your own context. The executable member adapter in this version is Kimi ACP only. Never let a member deploy, delete remote resources, or make payment choices on its own — escalate to the user. Every status output must include the exact Workspace-scoped TeamRun Dashboard URL returned by MCP.
